content:
Hi, I'm working on linux kernel and I have the C code as follows:

struct vm_area_struct *vma = find_vma(current->mm, start);
if (vma != NULL)
{
do something();
return 0;
}
else
{
pr_err("error");
return 1;
}

I have to translate it in Rust. I found Task::current that returns the current thread and Kernel::vm::mm::Area, how can i obtain the struct above?
